name: Savory Yogurt Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, gently combine the strained nonfat plain yogurt with the minced parsley and chives.
2. Add the maple syrup and black pepper to the mixture.
3. If desired, add the white wine and stir until well combined.
4. Do not overmix the ingredients; this will prevent the topping from becoming too thin.
CAUTION: Overstirring strained yogurt can cause it to become overly thin. Yield: 1 cup. Serving Size: 2 Tablespoons
